violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must register licensed food Safety Managers with the RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

Wood is used in the construction of prep/storage table in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The floors in the walk in cooler and walk in freezer area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2026
The floor in the walk in cooler and the tiles by cooking line is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The door to the outside, located in the side and back door, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small black flies at the dishwasher area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Pest control was at the time of the inspection. New assessment and treatment will send to the food inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023

The pre-flush spray hose at the pre-washed sink at the dishwasher area is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2023
The condensate from the 2-door reach-in refrigeration unit is draining into the floor. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
The coving in some areas at the dishwasher area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
The ceiling in the walk-in refrigeration unit, dishwasher area and floor are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023
The floor in the dry storage room area has an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023
